---
name: Feature request
about: A change to how Page behaves
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
The situation, not the solution. *"My agent goes idle and I miss it because I'm
in another room"* — not *"add a louder ringtone."*

**Who else has this problem?**
Best guess. If the answer is "just me," that's fine — say so. We won't ship
something that's net-negative for everyone else, though.

**What would good look like?**
The shape of the change, in your head. Doesn't need to be a finished design.

**What have you tried already?**
Workarounds, hacks, third-party tools. Saves us suggesting them back to you.

**Anything we should know not to break?**
The things Page does today that you depend on.
